name: ai-visibility
description: Track your brand visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini

scripts.postinstall: npx prisma generate 2>/dev/null || true; npm install -g tsx 2>/dev/null; cd mcp-server && npx tsc 2>/dev/null || true; cd .. && mkdir -p dist/cli && echo "import('../../mcp-server/dist/index.js');" > dist/cli/index.js

author: Sharoz Dawa
